# Tshilidzi Development Trust
> A Zimbabwean NGO dedicated to youth empowerment and education.

Tshilidzi Development Trust works across Zimbabwe to empower young people through education access, skills development, mentorship, and community programs.

## Pages
- Home: https://tshilidzi.org
- About: https://tshilidzi.org/about
- Programs: https://tshilidzi.org/programs
- Projects: https://tshilidzi.org/projects
- News: https://tshilidzi.org/news
- Contact: https://tshilidzi.org/contact
- Get Involved: https://tshilidzi.org/get-involved

## Focus Areas
- Youth empowerment
- Education access
- Skills and vocational training
- Community development
- Zimbabwe

## Optional
- Sitemap: https://tshilidzi.org/sitemap.xml
